title: December 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 16''' is the 350th day of the year (351st in leap years). There are 15 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Charles Dennis]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Xander Berkeley]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Michael Jibson]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Ksenia Zelentsova]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 1|''Star Wars'' (1998) 1]] published.
*1998 – ''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 5]]''published.
*1998 – [[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 3|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 3]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] released on the Mac platform.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Squadrons Over Corellia]]'' released.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy (hardcover)|''Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy'' hardcover]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.15]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Rose Gilbert]] dies.
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader Annual 1|''Darth Vader Annual'' 1]] published.
*2015 – [[Kanan 9|''Kanan'' 9]] published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' is released.
*2016 – The [[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] for ''Rogue One: A Star Wars Story'' is released.
*2016 – [[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (novelization)|''Rogue One: A Star Wars Story'' novelization]] published in eBook format.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[The Art of Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: Rebel Dossier]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: Ultimate Sticker Encyclopedia]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Insider 170|''Star Wars Insider'' 170]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 8|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 8]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Doug Robinson]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures]]'' wins two Emmy Awards for "Outstanding Editing for a Preschool Animated Program" and "Outstanding Sound Mixing and Sound Editing for a Preschool Animated Program."
<noinclude>
